scope: single-state no-training output-space Gauss-Newton/NTK trust-step audit of the active coordinate denoiser; no optimizer, checkpoint, architecture, probability-path or later-Gate change

decision_rule.linear_fail: the damped output tangent cannot fit the visible target direction; repair the output parameterization rather than the optimizer
decision_rule.small_step_mismatch: the autograd tangent or numerical forward path is locally inconsistent; inspect implementation and precision before training
decision_rule.full_step_success: a one-step output-space natural-gradient update is locally effective; qualify a scalable optimizer/preconditioner mechanism before retraining
decision_rule.trust_region_only: the tangent is useful only inside a trust region; nonlinear curvature, not strict expressivity, limits ordinary parameter updates
decision_rule.nonlinear_fail: the linear tangent reaches the target but the nonlinear network leaves that tangent too quickly for a useful step; prioritize curvature-aware parameterization
decision_rule.boundary: This single-state no-training audit cannot qualify H1a, initialize production, add steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
